meaning: n.墙上凸出的托架,括弧,支架v.括在一起
examples: Each bracket is fixed to the wall with just three screws.
Most of the houses are out of our price bracket.
It is unfair to bracket together those who cannot work with those who will not.
Or maybe you are in the top bracket but taxes get raised in 2009.
That means a top-bracket player owes a federal tax of 23% on winning trades.
